info.title: Meida al ha-erev
info.instructionsBodyTwo: Efshar gam le-hosif ktav kavtan le-khol tmuna lifnei she-sholechim otan le-kulam.
info.uploadBody: Yihyu lakhem 24 shaot le-haleot tmunot, kedei she-tukhlu la-share et haragaim ha-yafim be-nahat.
info.instructionsBodyThree: Kedei lehorid tmuna, livchu lehitza arukah al ha-tmuna o tikshu al kizur ha-horda.

welcome.landingText: Ha-app shelakhem la-leylah kedei le-takeid ule-share rega'im, polaroid akhar polaroid.
welcome.installHint: Shamru et app ha-chatunah al masach ha-bayit le-chavayah kacha zormet.
welcome.installDescription: Ha-dapdefan shelakhem yakhol le-hatkhin et ha-app mi-kan.
welcome.iosInstallHint: Al iPhone, pitkhu et share sheet u-vkharu Add to Home Screen.
welcome.greetingSubText: Hoseifu et shimkhem kedei she-ha-tmunot shelkhem yeshukheru aleikhem kol ha-leylah.
welcome.noteTwo: Efshar le-hosif ktav kavtan le-khol tmuna.

instructions.body: Efshar le-share ad 20 tmunot be-meshekh ha-erev. Kol zekher she-atem ma'aleim nir'e le-kulam kan, kedei she-ha-chagigah tish'are chamah u-meshutefet.
instructions.notes: Efshar le-takeid akhshav o lakhzor yoter me'uchar u-le-halaot tmuna.

app.linkPrompt: Hoseifu et shimkhem be-mesak ha-briut kedei le-kasher et ha-tmunot shelkhem.
